query:
SELECT 
  d.id, d.title, d.status, d.valueCents, d.utmSource, d.utmMedium, d.utmCampaign, d.utmTerm, d.utmContent, d.leadSource, d.channelOrigin, d.createdAt
FROM deals d 
WHERE d.tenantId = 1 AND d.deletedAt IS NULL 
ORDER BY d.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT

FROM deals d 
WHERE d.tenantId = 1 AND d.deletedAt IS NULL 
ORDER BY d.createdAt DESC LIMIT 10;
